languages.text: "Раз уж между нами возникло нечто вроде доверия — или, если уж называть вещи своими именами, взаимной необходимости..." {n}Лария снимает с пальца перстень-печатку с гербом фон Валанциусов и протягивает его вам.{/n} "Полагаю, вы знаете цену подобной вещи. Отныне можете говорить от моего имени. Будьте любезны, не запятнайте его".

traits.locale_text: "Раз уж между нами возникло нечто вроде доверия — или, если уж называть вещи своими именами, взаимной необходимости..." {n}Лария снимает с пальца перстень-печатку с гербом фон Валанциусов и протягивает его вам.{/n} "Полагаю, вы знаете цену подобной вещи. Отныне можете говорить от моего имени. Будьте любезны, не запятнайте его".

languages.text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."
languages.original_text: "Раз уж между нами возникло нечто вроде доверия — или, если уж называть вещи своими именами, взаимной необходимости..." {n}Лария снимает с пальца перстень-печатку с гербом фон Валанциусов и протягивает его вам.{/n} "Полагаю, вы знаете цену подобной вещи. Отныне можете говорить от моего имени. Будьте любезны, не запятнайте его".

traits.locale_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

"Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

languages.text: “既然你我之间已经萌生出某种近乎信任的东西，或者换个更恰当的说法，相互需要……”{n}菈丽雅从手指上取下那枚刻着冯·瓦兰修斯家徽的图章戒指，递到你面前。{/n}“我想你应该明白这东西的分量。从今往后，你可以用我的名义行事。但请千万自重，别玷污了它。”
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: “既然你我之间已经萌生出某种近乎信任的东西，或者换个更恰当的说法，相互需要……”{n}菈丽雅从手指上取下那枚刻着冯·瓦兰修斯家徽的图章戒指，递到你面前。{/n}“我想你应该明白这东西的分量。从今往后，你可以用我的名义行事。但请千万自重，别玷污了它。”

languages.text: « Puisqu'une forme de confiance est née entre nous, ou pour appeler les choses par leur nom, une alliance de pure convenance... » {n}Laria ôte de son doigt la chevalière aux armes des von Valancius avant de vous la remettre.{/n} « Je présume que vous connaissez la valeur d'un tel objet. Dorénavant, vous êtes {mf|habilité|habilitée} à vous exprimer en mon nom. Mais veuillez avoir l'obligeance de ne pas le ternir, toutefois. »
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: « Puisqu'une forme de confiance est née entre nous, ou pour appeler les choses par leur nom, une alliance de pure convenance... » {n}Laria ôte de son doigt la chevalière aux armes des von Valancius avant de vous la remettre.{/n} « Je présume que vous connaissez la valeur d'un tel objet. Dorénavant, vous êtes {mf|habilité|habilitée} à vous exprimer en mon nom. Mais veuillez avoir l'obligeance de ne pas le ternir, toutefois. »

languages.text: "Madem aramızda güvene benzer bir hissiyat yeşerdi... Ya da bazı şeyleri uygun şekilde ifade etmek gerekirse karşılıklı ihtiyaç diyelim..." {n}Laria, parmağından von Valancius armalı mühür yüzüğünü çıkarıp sana uzatıyor.{/n} "Böyle bir şeyin değerini biliyorsunuzdur herhâlde. Bundan böyle benim adıma konuşabilirsiniz. Adıma leke sürmemeye özen gösterin."
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: "Madem aramızda güvene benzer bir hissiyat yeşerdi... Ya da bazı şeyleri uygun şekilde ifade etmek gerekirse karşılıklı ihtiyaç diyelim..." {n}Laria, parmağından von Valancius armalı mühür yüzüğünü çıkarıp sana uzatıyor.{/n} "Böyle bir şeyin değerini biliyorsunuzdur herhâlde. Bundan böyle benim adıma konuşabilirsiniz. Adıma leke sürmemeye özen gösterin."

languages.text: «Ya que ha surgido algo cercano a la confianza entre nosotr{mf|o|a}s, o, para ser exact{mf|o|a}s, una necesidad mutua...». {n}Laria se quita el anillo grabado con el escudo de armas de los von Valancius del dedo y te lo ofrece.{/n} «Imagino que es consciente del valor de este gesto. De aquí en adelante, puede hablar en mi nombre. Tenga la bondad de no mancillarlo».
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: «Ya que ha surgido algo cercano a la confianza entre nosotr{mf|o|a}s, o, para ser exact{mf|o|a}s, una necesidad mutua...». {n}Laria se quita el anillo grabado con el escudo de armas de los von Valancius del dedo y te lo ofrece.{/n} «Imagino que es consciente del valor de este gesto. De aquí en adelante, puede hablar en mi nombre. Tenga la bondad de no mancillarlo».

languages.text: "Da sich zwischen uns so etwas wie Vertrauen entwickelt hat ... oder, um die Dinge beim Namen zu nennen, ein beiderseitiges Interesse ..." {n}Laria zieht den Siegelring mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius von ihrem Finger und reicht ihn dir.{/n} "Ich nehme an, Ihr kennt den Wert eines solchen Dings. Fortan dürft Ihr in meinem Namen sprechen. Seid so nett und befleckt ihn nicht."
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: "Da sich zwischen uns so etwas wie Vertrauen entwickelt hat ... oder, um die Dinge beim Namen zu nennen, ein beiderseitiges Interesse ... {n}Laria zieht den Siegelring mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius von ihrem Finger und reicht ihn dir.{/n} "Ich nehme an, Ihr kennt den Wert eines solchen Dings. Fortan dürft Ihr in meinem Namen sprechen. Seid so nett und befleckt ihn nicht."

languages.text: 「我々には、信頼に近いもの、あるいは正確に言えば、互いの必要性のようなものが芽生えた。」{n}ラリアは、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の紋章が刻まれた印鑑リングを指から外し、あなたに差し出した。{/n}「あなたは、このようなものの価値を理解しているでしょう。これから、あなたは私の名で発言しても構いません。ただ、その名声を汚さないようにしてください。」
languages.original_text: "Since something akin to trust has sprung up between us — or, to call things by their proper name, mutual necessity..." {n}Laria removes the signet ring with the von Valancius coat of arms from her finger and holds it out to you.{/n} "I imagine you know the value of such a thing. Henceforth, you may speak in my name. Be kind enough not to tarnish it."

traits.locale_text: 「我々には、信頼に近いもの、あるいは正確に言えば、互いの必要性のようなものが芽生えた。」{n}ラリアは、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の紋章が刻まれた印鑑リングを指から外し、あなたに差し出した。{/n}「あなたは、このようなものの価値を理解しているでしょう。これから、あなたは私の名で発言しても構いません。ただ、その名声を汚さないようにしてください。」
